title: Keto Caramelized Flaky American Pie Crust
description: A low-carb flaky pie crust made with caramelized almonds and perfect for keto diets.
instructions: In a food processor, blend caramelized almonds until fine crumbs.
Add coconut flour, eggs, and salt. Blend until a dough forms.
On a floured surface, roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch pie dish and trim the edges.
Melt butter and brush the crust with it.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Let it cool completely before serving.
